1.title: DeliveryErrors Sum (by DestinationType and FilterName)
1.query:
timeseries delivery_errors_sum_by_destination_type_filter_name = avg(cloud.aws.logs.delivery_errors_sum_by_destination_type_filter_name),
  by: { dt.entity.custom_device }
| fieldsAdd custom_device_name = entityName(dt.entity.custom_device)
| sort arrayAvg(delivery_errors_sum_by_destination_type_filter_name) desc
| limit 20
